title.en: China-to-Lesotho Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入莱索托：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入賴索托：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Lesotho LSI conformity expectations, LEWA regulatory oversight, LEC grid-connection approval, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interconnection evidence, IEC 61000 and IEC 62920 EMC evidence, likely South African NRS interconnection practice, and 220/380 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与莱索托LSI合格评定预期、LEWA监管、LEC并网批准、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网证据、IEC 61000和IEC 62920 EMC证据、可能适用的南非NRS并网规程及220/380 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與賴索托LSI合格評定預期、LEWA監管、LEC併網批准、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網證據、IEC 61000和IEC 62920 EMC證據、可能適用的南非NRS併網規程及220/380 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, LSI conformity scope determination, LEWA licensing approval, LEC grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Lesotho LSI standards adoption, LEWA licensing requirements, LEC grid-connection technical requirements, South African NRS practice, SACU/South Africa transit requirements, and project-owner specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、LSI合格评定范围裁定、LEWA许可审批、LEC并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行莱索托LSI标准采纳状况、LEWA许可要求、LEC并网技术要求、南非NRS规程、SACU/南非过境要求及项目业主规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、LSI合格評定範圍裁定、LEWA許可審批、LEC併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行賴索托LSI標準採納狀況、LEWA許可要求、LEC併網技術要求、南非NRS規程、SACU/南非過境要求及項目業主規格。

answer_first.en: Lesotho's electricity supply is regulated by LEWA, served by LEC, and supported by imports from South Africa plus Muela hydro. For Chinese solar PV inverters, the rare favorable point is genuine nominal grid alignment: Lesotho uses 220/380 V at 50 Hz, matching China's 220/380 V 50 Hz base parameters. That match does not make Chinese GB/T evidence automatically acceptable. Expect project-level review by LEC and LEWA, likely reference to South African NRS interconnection practice, and a need for IEC 62109 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface, IEC 61000-series harmonic/EMC, and IEC 62920 PV inverter EMC evidence. GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 documents should be treated as China baseline evidence only, not substitutes for Lesotho project acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 莱索托电力供应由LEWA监管、LEC运营，并依赖南非进口电力和Muela水电。对中国太阳能光伏逆变器而言，少见的有利点是名义电网参数真正一致：莱索托使用220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国220/380 V、50 Hz基础参数相同。但这种一致性并不意味着中国GB/T证据会被自动接受。应预期LEC和LEWA进行项目层面审查，可能引用南非NRS并网规程，并需要IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口、IEC 61000系列谐波/EMC以及IEC 62920光伏逆变器EMC证据。GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024文件应仅视为中国基准证据，不能替代莱索托项目验收。
answer_first.zht: 賴索托電力供應由LEWA監管、LEC運營，並依賴南非進口電力和Muela水電。對中國太陽能光伏逆變器而言，少見的有利點是名義電網參數真正一致：賴索托使用220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國220/380 V、50 Hz基礎參數相同。但這種一致性並不意味著中國GB/T證據會被自動接受。應預期LEC和LEWA進行項目層面審查，可能引用南非NRS併網規程，並需要IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網接口、IEC 61000系列諧波/EMC以及IEC 62920光伏逆變器EMC證據。GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024文件應僅視為中國基準證據，不能替代賴索托項目驗收。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
